title: GMS Week 46 - PROLONGED MALAISE!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 21/11/2022
Image reference: 2022-11-21_gms-week-46-prolonged-malaise_img1.jpg
All recycling destinations across the Indian sub-continent and even Turkey have been suffering a prolonged and agonizing malaise over the past six months (at least), one that's showing no sign of abating any time soon. In fact, prices have deteriorated even further this week at all sub-continent locations and receiving indications / offers - even in the USD 400s/LDT on small LDT units - is gradually becoming a reality. As such, any Ship Owner expecting some of the better levels (even from last week) will have to readjust their expectations much lower, in order to bring any sort of firm offer to the table.
